name: Mahanagar Gas Limited
summary: Mahanagar Gas Limited operates as a natural gas distribution company primarily in India. The company offers domestic piped natural gas (PNG), commercial PNG, industrial PNG, and compressed natural gas (CNG), as well as manufactures gas geysers. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 256 CNG filing stations providing the gas to approximately 0.75 million vehicles; and supplied PNG to approximately 1.26 million domestic, 3,949 commercial, and 72 industrial consumers through a pipeline network of approximately 5,630 kilometers. Mahanagar Gas Limited was founded in 1995 and is based in Mumbai, India.
